dataList.name: For You Who Love the City
dataList.desc:
If an ally is at less than 30% HP when hit, said ally heals 80% HP and other allies heal 40% HP next turn (once per Encounter)
- Excess healing beyond max HP is applied as Shield
- If an ally healed 50+ HP due to the above effect, gain 3 [AttackUp] and 3 [DefenseDown]

dataList.name: Meat Tenderizer
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #4 Deployed Identity]

If this unit has 2+ Blunt Attack Skills, gain 1 [ParryingResultUp] at Turn Start

dataList.name: Meat Tenderizer+
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #4 Deployed Identity]

If this unit has 2+ Blunt Attack Skills, gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [ParryingResultUp] at Turn Start

dataList.name: Meat Tenderizer++
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #4, <style="upgradeHighlight">#5</style> Deployed Identities]

If this unit has 2+ Blunt Attack Skills, gain 2 [ParryingResultUp] at Turn Start

dataList.name: Chance & Choice
dataList.desc: Random chance for the leftmost Slot's E.G.O Skill to deal -50% damage or +150% damage (once per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: E.G.O Skills deal more(or less) damage

dataList.name: Entangled Fate
dataList.desc: Combat Start: At 7+ A-Reson., all allies gain Final Power +5 for this turn (once per Encounter)

dataList.name: Raincloud
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: At 30+ total sum of [Sinking] Potency and [Sinking] Count on all enemies, apply the following effects:

- Skills that inflict [Sinking] Potency or Count: Final Power +1 (including 'Unique Sinking'; excluding E.G.O Skills)

- When 6 or more Identities have Attack Skills that inflict [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking', Skills that inflict [Sinking] Potency or Count also deal +20% damage (including 'Unique Sinking' and Backup Units; excluding E.G.O Skills)
 · If the target is at -45 SP, deal additional +10% damage

- When 10 or more Identities have Attack Skills that inflict [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking', Plus Coin Skills that inflict [Sinking] Potency or Count also gain Coin Power +1 (including 'Unique Sinking' and Backup Units; excluding E.G.O Skills)
 · Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Coin Power, gain Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)

dataList.name: The End of all Evil
dataList.desc:
Activates when there are 3 or more The Pequod-faction Identities (counting Backup units)

On Hit with an Attack Skill against enemies with [Laceration]: 50% chance to gain 3 [Breath] or +2 [Breath] Count (3 times per turn for each character)

On Crit: 80% chance to not consume [Breath] Count (once per turn for each character; including E.G.O Skills and Counter Skills)
On Crit Heads Hit with a Base Skill: Inflict +1 more of the negative effect with that Coin (once per turn for each character; including Counter Skills and excluding E.G.O Skills)

If #1 Deployed Identity kills an enemy, The Pequod-faction Identities gain 1 [PenetrateResultUp], 1 [Protection], and 1 [CriticalDamageUp] each turn for the rest of this Encounter (max 3 times per Encounter)

If one of The Pequod-faction Identities attacks and hits an enemy, heal 7 SP for The Pequod-faction Identity with the earliest Deployment order (once per Skill)
When an ally kills an enemy, heal 15 SP for The Pequod-faction Identity with the earliest Deployment order if said Identity lost SP

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: On Crit: Chance to not lose Poise Count. Increase the amount of negative effect inflicted
Gain Haste, Offense Level Up, Damage Up

dataList.name: Miniature Ferris Wheel
dataList.desc:
All Bloodfiend allies: Base Skill Coin Power +1, deal +([BloodDinner_Accumulation] / 10)% Skill damage

Turn End: Among allies with [Laceration], 2 allies with the least HP heal 5% HP and gain 10 [SwirlingBloodPersonality] at next Turn Start

On enemy Kill, increase [BloodDinner] by (enemy Core max HP / 10) (max 50)

Turn End: If an ally died this turn, all allies gain 2 [Enhancement] next turn

In Encounters where backup enemies appear: When new enemies appear, inflict 5 [Laceration] and +3 [Laceration] Count against them at Combat Start.
If there is a <Bloodfiend> among allies: When new enemies enter the battle, activate [Laceration] on all enemies twice and reduce their [Laceration] Count by 2

dataList.name: Searing Hammer
dataList.desc:
If the enemy has [VibrationIgnition], apply the following effects:
- On Base Skill Hit, inflict 1 [Combustion] (3 times per Skill)
- On Base Skill Hit, if the enemy has 15+ [VibrationIgnition], inflict +1 [Combustion] Count (2 times per Skill)
- For every 3 [Combustion], +1% to Stagger Threshold raised by [VibrationExplosion] (max 15%)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Tremor Burst increases Stagger threshold further

dataList.name: Red Necktie
dataList.desc: Skill 3 that inflicts [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn': Clash Power +2 and deal +30% damage

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain Clash Power and deal more damage

dataList.name: Uniform - Liu Assoc.
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

Liu Association Identities: Base Attack Skills gain Plus Coin Power +2 (Minus Coin Skills gain Base Power +(8 / # of Coins) (min 1; rounded down))

Non-Skill 3 Skills (including E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Combustion] Potency, Count or 'Unique Burn' deal +20% damage

Skill 3 that inflicts [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' gain Plus Coin Power +1 (Minus Coin Skills gain Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)) and deal +30% damage 
- Identities in a faction deal +5% damage for every same-faction Identity in the Team (max 20%; including Backup Units)

Turn End: 2 allies with the least SP heal 8 SP
- If affected allies are at 0 SP or lower, heal 5 additional SP

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain Skill Power and deal more damage

dataList.name: Someone's Device
dataList.desc:
Attack End: If [IndexPrescriptTargetToEnemy] is killed, the Identity who attacked and killed [IndexPrescriptTargetToEnemy] gains 1 [AzureResultUp] next turn; inflict +3 [Sinking] Count to 1 random surviving enemy (once per turn)
- If the unit that killed [IndexPrescriptTargetToEnemy] is in The Index faction, gain 1 [Enhancement] instead of [AzureResultUp] next turn (once per turn)

Turn End: The Index faction units take ([KarmaOfIndexAlly] Stack on self)% HP damage.
(Does not get Staggered due to this effect; this damage does not reduce the allies' HP below 20% HP)
Then, Identities who took damage due to the above effect gain ([KarmaOfIndexAlly] Stack on self / 5) [ResultEnhancement] next turn (max 2)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain Gloom Power Up. The Index Identities gain Attack Power Up instead
The Index Identities take damage and gain Power Up next turn

dataList.name: Providence of the Prescript
dataList.desc:
Identities that inflicted [Sinking], [Sinking] Count, or 'Unique Sinking', gain 3 [Breath] or +2 [Breath] Count at Turn Start (once per turn per Identity)

During the Encounter, if an Identity has gained [Breath] 3 times due to the above effect, starting from the next turn, the said Sinner deals +30% damage on Critical Hit

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Deal more Damage on Critical Hit

dataList.name: Omni-tool
dataList.desc: When Skills of the same Attack Type hit an enemy 12 times, the enemy gains +0.1 Resistance against that Attack Type (3 times per Encounter per enemy/Abnormality Parts; this effect cannot raise Resistance value over 2.0)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Target becomes more vulnerable to an Attack Type

dataList.name: Omni-tool+
dataList.desc: When Skills of the same Attack Type hit an enemy 9 times, the enemy gains +0.1 Resistance against that Attack Type (3 times per Encounter per enemy/Abnormality Parts; this effect cannot raise Resistance value over 2.0)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Target becomes more vulnerable to an Attack Type

dataList.name: Omni-tool++
dataList.desc: When Skills of the same Attack Type hit an enemy 6 times, the enemy gains +0.1 Resistance against that Attack Type (3 times per Encounter per enemy/Abnormality Parts; this effect cannot raise Resistance value over 2.0)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Target becomes more vulnerable to an Attack Type

dataList.name: Stolen Fixer Magazine
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: Gain 1 [HitResultUp]

Combat Start: Gain 1 [HitDamageUp] if Envy A-Reson. is activated

Encounter Start: If there are 4 or more The Middle-faction Identities on the battlefield, apply [RetaliationBook] to a random enemy

dataList.name: Thermal Weapon
dataList.desc:
On Hit with Envy Skill or Counter Skill, inflict +1 [Laceration] Count or +1 [Combustion] Count (3 times per turn)

When [Laceration] Count on an enemy drops below 1 during combat, reduce [Combustion] Count instead if said enemy has 2+ [Combustion] Count (3 times per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Inflict Bleed Count and Burn Count

dataList.name: Pure-white Canvas
dataList.desc:
On Hit with Plus Coin Attack Skills against an enemy with 15+ [Laceration], heal 3 SP (once per turn for each Identity)
- If said Identity or target has 3+ types of negative effects, heal 6 SP instead

dataList.name: Average Artwork
dataList.desc:
The Ring-faction Identities gain [Inspire]

If The Ring-faction Identity with [Inspire] hits an enemy with Lust or Slash Skills, inflict [ObjectOfExploration] on said enemy next turn
- If the enemy already has [ObjectOfExploration], replace [ObjectOfExploration] with [PaintingMaterial]

If The Ring-faction Identity with [Inspire] kills an enemy that has [PaintingMaterial], said Identity gains 1 [PlusCoinValueUp] next turn (once per turn)

dataList.name: Exquisite Artwork
dataList.desc:
The Ring-faction Identities gain [Inspire]

If The Ring-faction Identity with [Inspire] hits an enemy, inflict [ObjectOfExploration] on said enemy
- If the enemy already has [ObjectOfExploration], replace [ObjectOfExploration] with [PaintingMaterial]

If The Ring-faction Identity with [Inspire] kills an enemy that has [PaintingMaterial], said Identity loses [Inspire] and gains [GreatAesthetics]

dataList.name: The Spider's Thread
dataList.desc: Allies who use Defense Skill deal +10% damage with Skill 3 next turn (once per turn)

dataList.name: The Spider's Thread+
dataList.desc: Allies who use Defense Skill deal +15% damage with Skill 3 next turn (once per turn)

dataList.name: The Spider's Thread++
dataList.desc: Allies who use Defense Skill deal +20% damage with Skill 3 next turn (once per turn)

dataList.name: Someone's Azure Blade
dataList.desc:
Combat Start: Allies with Shield gain 1 [CriticalDamageUp]
On Crit with ally Skill, said ally gains Shield equal to ([Breath] / 5) for the next turn (max 15)

dataList.name: Baleful Hwando

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Take more damage and lose Clash Power

dataList.name: One with the Blade
dataList.desc: All allies deal +25% damage

dataList.name: Tarnished Gauntlet
Golden Hour
dataList.desc:
Min & Max Speed +3 for all allies
Final Power +2 when using Skills against slower targets with 4+ Speed difference
On Hit against an enemy, inflict 1 Bind next turn (4 times per turn)

dataList.name: Record Logs of That Day
Potentialities
dataList.desc:
When Staggered due to damage, recover from Stagger; then gain Shield equal to 50% of Max HP and remove 1 random removable negative effect on self (excluding forced Staggers, 2 times per Encounter)

Gain 20 Poise at the start of the next turn after activating the above effect (once per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Recover from Stagger; remove negative effect
